zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh Peverell於大約1308年出生時，他的父親James Peverell30歲，母親Margaret de Cornwall30歲。他於大約1320年與Elizabeth Cobham在英國英格蘭戴文桑德福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1372年6月21日在英國可瓦爾享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭可瓦爾博德明。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hugh Peverell于大约1308年出生时，他的父亲James Peverell30岁，母亲Margaret de Cornwall30岁。他于大约1320年与Elizabeth Cobham在英国英格兰戴文桑德福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1372年6月21日在英国可瓦爾享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰可瓦爾博德明。

nameMeanings.name: Peverell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peverall
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Old French Peurel (Latin Piperellus), a diminutive of Old French pevre ‘pepper’ (Anglo-Norman French peivere, Latin piper), originally perhaps used as a nickname on the Continent but used as a personal name in Anglo-Norman England.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh Peverell was born about 1308, his father, James Peverell, was 30 and his mother, Margaret de Cornwall, was 30. He married Elizabeth Cobham about 1320, in Sandford, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 21 June 1372, in Cornwall, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Bodmin, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh Peverell est né environ 1308, son père, James Peverell, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Cornwall, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Cobham environ 1320, à Sandford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 21 juin 1372, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Bodmin, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh Peverell um 1308 geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Peverell 30 und seine Mutter Margaret de Cornwall 30. Er hat um 1320 in Sandford, Devon, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Cobham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Juni 1372 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Cornwall, England und wurde in Bodmin, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Peverell è nato il circa 1308, il suo padre, James Peverell, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Cornwall, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Cobham circa 1320, nel Sandford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 21 giugno 1372, nel Cornwall, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Bodmin, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Peverellが約1308年に生まれた時，父James Peverellは30歳，母Margaret de Cornwallは30歳であった。約1320年にイギリスイギリスデボンサンドフォードでElizabeth Cobhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1372年6月21日にイギリスコルンワルで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスコルンワルボドミンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Peverell(이)가 대략 1308년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Peverell(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Cornwall(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 샌드퍼드에서 Elizabeth Cobham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1372년 6월 21일 영국 코른월에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 보드민에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Peverell nasceu aproximadamente 1308, seu pai, James Peverell, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Cornwall, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Cobham aproximadamente 1320, em Sandford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de junho de 1372, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh Peverell родился около 1308 г., его отцу по имени James Peverell было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Cornwall, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Cobham около 1320 г. в местности сэндфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 21 июня 1372 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности бодминь, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Hugh Peverell nació aproximadamente 1308, su papá, James Peverell, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Margaret de Cornwall, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Cobham aproximadamente 1320, en Sandford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 21 de junio de 1372, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
